$comment: Spec 102 (data-model.md §E3, T013). Sibling to realm-config.json. Carries data the Keycloak importer doesn't itself consume but that the TS and Python middlewares need: per-resource PDP-unavailable fallback rules. Resources NOT listed here get implicit { mode: 'deny_all' } behaviour. Schema: docs/docs/specs/102-comprehensive-rbac-tests-and-completion/contracts/realm-config-extras.schema.json.
